title: Create: Bronze Tools n' Stuff
description: Makes copper useful for making bronze, with which you can make bronze tools!
body:
# Create: Bronze Tools n' Stuff
This mod adds a bunch of things! It adds tin, bronze, blocks and nuggets of both, and bronze tools... and a Bronze Sheet
The mod is actually useless a bit, since you need iron for the mixer, but not gonna lie, you can make the tools atleast to give new people as a beginner. 
Hope you have fun
